mapper.select:
SELECT a.predict_id, a.predict_model, a.user_id, a.predict_time, b.user_name,c.dataset_name FROM powersystem.predict a,powersystem.user b,powersystem.dataset c
AND a.predict_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{predictId}, '%')
AND a.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND predict_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{predictModel}, '%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(predict_time, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN #{updateTimeStart} AND #{updateTimeEnd}
AND a.user_id=b.user_id AND a.dataset_id=c.dataset_id
order by a.predict_time desc
